name: Cosmus the Cheat
bio:
Physical Appearance: Imperial male wearing a collared shirt and sack cloth pants. Carries a tan begging cup and a small amount of gold.

Race: Imperial

Personality Keywords: impoverished, opportunistic, itinerant

Role: Commoner and beggar living in the city of Bravil.

Home Location Information: Sleeps outdoors on a bedroll located behind The Fair Deal in Bravil.

Daily Routine: Cosmus sleeps from 10pm to 6am behind The Fair Deal. After waking, he travels to the Great Chapel of Mara and begs near the side of the chapel until 10am. He then moves to the area near the Northern Gate until 2pm, after which he relocates to the vicinity of A Warlock’s Luck. At 6pm, if he has obtained food, he crosses the bridge and eats on the bench in front of the Lonely Suitor Lodge. If he has not found food, he steals from Wretched Aia’s food bag in the southwestern part of Bravil. If successful, he eats at the bench; otherwise, he wanders the city until returning to his bedroll at 10pm.

Abilities: Has no formal combat training and relies only on physical attacks. He is infected with Chills, which may be transmitted through close combat.

Personality – Survival by Any Means: Cosmus survives through begging and theft and follows a fixed routine that takes him between religious, commercial, and residential areas of Bravil. His willingness to steal food when begging fails distinguishes his behavior from other beggars. He is counted among the city’s poor and suffering and can be approached for information related to local matters when required.
author: Bethesda
